name: City Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs lean pork, cut into pieces 1 1/2 inches long and 1/4 inch thick
8 or 9 pieces of veal, cut into the same size as the pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lean pork and veal into equal pieces.
2. Alternate stringing the pork and veal pieces onto skewers, using 8 or 9 pieces per skewer.
3. Season the meat with salt.
4. Coat each piece in flour, then dip in beaten egg, followed by bread crumbs.
5. Fry the coated meat until browned on all sides.
6. Transfer the fried meat to a baking dish that has been sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
7. Cover the dish and bake until the meat is tender.
(Note: In the past, this meat was often eaten right off the skewers.)
